description: The application name, shown as the OS task/window title.
Heading on the device-discovery screen.
Sub-heading explaining the network requirement on the discovery screen.
en: Make sure your TV is on and connected to the same Wi-Fi network.

description: Title shown when device discovery fails to start.
Body text shown when device discovery fails to start.
en: Check your network connection and try again.

description: Button that restarts a failed device search.
Status text shown while scanning the network for TVs.
Reassurance shown beneath the searching status text.
en: This can take a few seconds.

description: Count of TVs found by discovery.
en: {count, plural, =1{1 device found} other{{count} devices found}}

description: Stand-in name used when a device's real name is unknown, e.g. 'Accept the request on your TV'.
Title of the pairing banner when the TV shows a code to type in.
Title of the pairing banner when the user must accept a prompt on the TV.
Instructions for entering the code the TV displays.
en: {deviceName} is showing a 6-digit code. Type it below to finish pairing.

description: Instructions for accepting the pairing prompt on the TV itself.
en: Accept the connection request on {deviceName} using its remote.

description: Placeholder text in the 6-digit pairing-code input. Keep it as six digits.
